data.name: Dominó Gótico
data.detailed_description:
Gothic Domino is a 2D strip domino game with dark gothic elements and a mysterious time loop.

Play classic domino matches where the goal is to outplay your opponent and gradually remove their clothing while uncovering the secrets behind a cycle of death and resurrection.

Features:

- Classic domino gameplay with a strategic twist

- Stylized 2D characters and gothic atmosphere

- Progressive clothing removal system

- Simple mechanics, easy to learn and engaging to master
data.about_the_game:

Features:

- Simple mechanics, easy to learn and engaging to master
data.short_description: A dark 2D domino game with strip mechanics. Defeat your opponent, remove their clothing, and break the cycle of death and resurrection.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 德文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4000 or better
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4000 or better
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX
